headline: Q1 Earnings Roundup: Estée Lauder (NYSE:EL) And The Rest Of The Personal Care Segment
summary: Quarterly earnings results are a good time to check in on a company’s progress, especially compared to its peers in the same sector. Today we are looking at Estée Lauder (NYSE:EL) and the best and worst performers in the personal care industry.

headline: ELF Beauty Taps Skincare and Global Expansion as Growth Shifts Higher
summary: ELF's growth profile is shifting as skincare, Rhode and international expansion gain scale, but softer core demand and cost pressures cloud visibility.

raw.headline: ELF Beauty Taps Skincare and Global Expansion as Growth Shifts Higher
raw.summary: ELF's growth profile is shifting as skincare, Rhode and international expansion gain scale, but softer core demand and cost pressures cloud visibility.

headline: ELF Stock Outlook Hinges on Rhode Growth and Core Brand Reset in 2027
summary: ELF's fiscal 2027 outlook depends on Rhode's rapid growth, broader skin care reach and whether its core e.l.f. brand reset can revive slowing momentum.
